thesis: Photonics is the current AI supply chain bottleneck. Laser shortage with >1yr lead times. Hyperscaler demand exceeds manufacturing capacity. CPO transition driving 10x demand increase. Made-in-USA tariff advantage vs Chinese competitors (Innolight, Eoptolink). Basket approach: COHR (highest conviction), LITE (long-term), AAOI (highest risk/reward — $456M FY rev → $4.5B ARR target by mid-2027 = 900%+ growth), MRVL (best R/R at $79). Upstream plays: AXTI (indium phosphide), IQE (epiwafer supplier). AAOI = 'early SNDK' — bottleneck company getting repriced. In-house laser manufacturing, tripling TX capacity. 3 hyperscale customers each >10% revenue. FY2026 guidance >$1B rev + >$120M non-GAAP operating profit. Gross margins targeting 35-38% by mid-2027 → 40% by Q4 2027.
size: Basket: COHR + LITE + AAOI + MRVL. Upstream: AXTI + IQE

sources.author: crux_capital_
sources.summary: Making AAOI largest photonics position, bought during Q4 earnings call. $378M/month transceiver revenue target by mid-2027. In-house InP laser mfg. Made-in-USA moat. Execution risk is main concern. Other positions: COHR (highest conviction), LITE (long-term), MRVL (best R/R at $79)
